AES-256-CBC.description: AES-256-CBC, PKCS5/PKCS7 padding. Key=32-byte UTF-8; IV=16-byte UTF-8 (required).
AES-256-CBC.encrypt_code:
def encrypt(plaintext, key, iv):
    # key = 32-byte UTF-8 string, iv = 16-byte UTF-8 string
    kb = key.encode('UTF-8')
    ib = iv.encode('UTF-8')
    sk = SecretKeySpec(kb, 'AES')
    c  = Cipher.getInstance('AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding')
    c.init(1, sk, IvParameterSpec(ib))
    return base64.b64encode(bytes(bytearray(c.doFinal(plaintext.encode('UTF-8')))))
AES-256-CBC.decrypt_code:
def decrypt(ciphertext_b64, key, iv):
    # key = 32-byte UTF-8 string, iv = 16-byte UTF-8 string
    kb = key.encode('UTF-8')
    ib = iv.encode('UTF-8')
    sk = SecretKeySpec(kb, 'AES')
    c  = Cipher.getInstance('AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding')
    c.init(2, sk, IvParameterSpec(ib))
    return bytearray(c.doFinal(base64.b64decode(ciphertext_b64))).decode('UTF-8')

AES-CBC-128.description: Standard AES-128-CBC with PKCS5 padding. UTF-8 key (16 chars) and IV (16 chars, blank = reuse key). Ciphertext in Base64. Matches JS crypto.subtle AES-CBC.
AES-CBC-128.encrypt_code:
def encrypt(plaintext, key, iv):
    # plaintext : string to encrypt
    # key       : UTF-8 string, must be 16 chars (AES-128)
    # iv        : UTF-8 string, 16 chars; leave empty to reuse key bytes (JS default)
    from javax.crypto import Cipher
    from javax.crypto.spec import SecretKeySpec, IvParameterSpec
    import base64

    key_bytes = key.encode('UTF-8')
    iv_bytes  = iv.encode('UTF-8') if iv and iv.strip() else key_bytes

    secret_key = SecretKeySpec(key_bytes, 'AES')
    iv_spec    = IvParameterSpec(iv_bytes)
    cipher     = Cipher.getInstance('AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding')
    cipher.init(Cipher.ENCRYPT_MODE, secret_key, iv_spec)

    encrypted = cipher.doFinal(plaintext.encode('UTF-8'))
    return base64.b64encode(bytes(bytearray(encrypted)))
AES-CBC-128.decrypt_code:
def decrypt(ciphertext_b64, key, iv):
    # ciphertext_b64 : Base64 encoded ciphertext string
    # key            : UTF-8 string, must be 16 chars (AES-128)
    # iv             : UTF-8 string, 16 chars; leave empty to reuse key bytes (JS default)
    from javax.crypto import Cipher
    from javax.crypto.spec import SecretKeySpec, IvParameterSpec
    import base64

    key_bytes = key.encode('UTF-8')
    iv_bytes  = iv.encode('UTF-8') if iv and iv.strip() else key_bytes

    secret_key = SecretKeySpec(key_bytes, 'AES')
    iv_spec    = IvParameterSpec(iv_bytes)
    cipher     = Cipher.getInstance('AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding')
    cipher.init(Cipher.DECRYPT_MODE, secret_key, iv_spec)

    decrypted = cipher.doFinal(base64.b64decode(ciphertext_b64))
    return bytearray(decrypted).decode('UTF-8')
